channel.title: Ntag213 on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog
channel.description: Recent content in Ntag213 on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog

item.title: Cloning Lego Dimensions tags
item.description: Introduction In the article Lego Dimensions, I covered all the available packs for playing with the console. Unfortunately, not all of them are available for purchase anymore except from collectors, <brickset.com> or some resellers. After some research, several pages provide instructions about the tags themselves and how to ‘fix’ or ‘clone’ them. Materials Each base is a NFC tag NTAG 213 which is either read only (characters) or rewritable (vehicles).
